scale.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl tracking-tighter lowercase font-light
scale.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl tracking-tight lowercase font-light

header.style: fixed w-full top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#F5EFE6]/80 border-b border-[#E2D9C8]/50 transition-all duration-300
header.nav: hidden md:flex gap-8 text-sm uppercase tracking-widest text-[#2A2724]

hero.layout: min-h-[90vh] flex flex-col justify-center relative px-6 md:px-12 lg:px-24
hero.content_style: relative z-10 flex flex-col items-start gap-6 max-w-3xl

services_tabs.style: flex gap-4 overflow-x-auto pb-4 hide-scrollbar snap-x

cards.style: bg-[#FDFBF7] p-8 border border-[#E2D9C8] hover:-translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-300 flex flex-col gap-4

buttons.primary: bg-[#2A2724] text-[#F5EFE6] px-8 py-4 text-sm tracking-widest uppercase hover:bg-[#1A1816] transition-colors rounded-none w-fit
buttons.outline: border border-[#2A2724] text-[#2A2724] px-8 py-4 text-sm tracking-widest uppercase hover:bg-[#2A2724] hover:text-[#F5EFE6] transition-colors rounded-none w-fit

form.input: w-full bg-transparent border-b border-[#E2D9C8] py-3 text-[#2A2724] placeholder:text-[#6C665E] focus:outline-none focus:border-[#2A2724] transition-colors rounded-none
form.label: text-xs tracking-widest uppercase text-[#6C665E] mb-2 block

hero.description: Cozy minimal interior with warm light and plants. Acts as a soothing background.

about.description: Soft, natural interior setup representing the 'tender home' concept.

masters.description: Portrait of a master esthetician in white uniform.

instructions_to_main_agent: This is a premium minimalist single-page website for a Moscow beauty salon.
Implement smooth scrolling using 'lenis' to give it a premium feel.
Use 'Cormorant Garamond' for headings and 'Manrope' for body text. Ensure fonts are imported.
Brand name 'вскользь' must always be displayed in lowercase in headings.
The Hero section should feature an elegant, large, lowercase title and a subtle scroll indicator.
Use framer-motion for micro-animations like text reveals on scroll and subtle hover states.
Services & Prices section should feature category tabs and irregular bento-style grids for cards.
The booking form must be embedded directly on the page using Shadcn components (Form, Input, Select, Calendar).
Provide a Sonner toast for successful booking confirmation.
Embed a Yandex Map iframe in the Contacts section pointing to 'Мясницкая 30/1/2с1'.
Ensure generous whitespace, using Tailwind classes like 'py-24' or 'py-32' between sections.
Apply 'data-testid' to all buttons, links, and form inputs for testing purposes.
